inputs.label: Roof Length
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal length of the eave edge (building length), used to calculate total eave drip edge distance.

inputs.label: Roof Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal span from eave to eave (building width), used to compute the horizontal run of the gable rake.

inputs.label: Roof Pitch
inputs.businessContext: Rise in inches per 12 inches of horizontal run, used to compute the slope length of the rake.

inputs.label: Gable Overhang
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal projection of the rake beyond the gable wall, added to half of roof width to obtain the total run.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra material to allow for cutting, fitting, and installation errors.
